Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.utils

Class FreshInstantiation

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.utils.FreshInstantiation
public class FreshInstantiation extends Object
Permits to instantiate the bound identifiers of a quantified predicate with fresh free identifiers.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FreshInstantiation(QuantifiedPredicate predicate, ITypeEnvironment initialTypenv)
    Instantiates the given predicate with free identifiers that are fresh in the given type environment.
    FreshInstantiation(QuantifiedPredicate predicate, ITypeEnvironment initialTypenv, String[] names)
    Instantiates the given predicate with free identifiers that are fresh in the given type environment and based on the provided names.

      private static final String[] NO_NAMES

    • result

      private final Predicate result

  • Constructor Details

    • FreshInstantiation

      public FreshInstantiation(QuantifiedPredicate predicate, ITypeEnvironment initialTypenv)
      Instantiates the given predicate with free identifiers that are fresh in the given type environment.
      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate to instantiate
      initialTypenv - the type environment to consider for freshness

    • FreshInstantiation

      public FreshInstantiation(QuantifiedPredicate predicate, ITypeEnvironment initialTypenv, String[] names)
      Instantiates the given predicate with free identifiers that are fresh in the given type environment and based on the provided names. If not enough names are provided for all bound identifiers, the remaining fresh names will be based on the corresponding bound identifiers declarations. If too many names are provided, the extra ones will be ignored.
      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate to instantiate
      initialTypenv - the type environment to consider for freshness
      names - the base names to use to make fresh names

  • Method Details

    • getResult

      public Predicate getResult()
      Returns the result of this instantiation.
      Returns:
      the instantiated predicate

    • getFreshIdentifiers

      public FreeIdentifier[] getFreshIdentifiers()
      Returns the free identifiers created by this instantiation.
      Returns:
      the fresh free identifiers

    • genFreshFreeIdent

      public static FreeIdentifier genFreshFreeIdent(ITypeEnvironment typeEnv, String baseName, Type type)
      Generates a fresh free identifier for the given type environment.
      Parameters:
      typeEnv - a given type environment
      baseName - a base name for the resulting identifier
      type - the type of the resulting free identifier
      Returns:
      a fresh free identifier
